variables.input:
timeseries sum(github.actions.jobs), by: { github.repository.name }
| summarize distinctRepositoryNames = collectDistinct(github.repository.name)
| expand distinctRepositoryNames
| sort distinctRepositoryNames

timeseries sum(github.actions.jobs), filter: { matchesValue(github.repository.name, $Repository) }, by: { github.actions.event.ref.name }
/*
fetch spans
| filter not isNull(github.actions.event.ref.name)
| filter github.repository.name == $Repository
| fields github.actions.event.ref.name
*/
| summarize distinctRef = collectDistinct(github.actions.event.ref.name)
| expand distinctRef
| sort distinctRef

16.title: Health State
16.query:
fetch spans
| filter github.repository.name == $Repository and (endsWith(github.actions.workflow.ref, $Branch) or endsWith(github.actions.checks.suite.ref.name, $Branch))
| filter (github.actions.type == "workflow" or github.actions.type == "checksuite") and (not isNull(github.actions.workflow.name) or not isNull(github.actions.checks.app.name)) and not isNull(github.actions.conclusion)
| filter github.actions.conclusion == "success" or github.actions.conclusion == "failure"
| fieldsAdd github.actions.workflow.name = coalesce(github.actions.workflow.name, github.actions.checks.app.name)
| sort start_time
| summarize github.actions.conclusion=takeLast(github.actions.conclusion), by: { github.actions.workflow.name, github.actions.event.ref.name }

17.title: Workflow Runs

20.title: Workflow Conclusions
20.query:
timeseries sum(github.actions.workflows), by: { github.actions.workflow_run.conclusion }, filter: { matchesValue(github.repository.name, $Repository) and matchesValue(github.actions.event.ref.name, $Branch) }
| fieldsAdd value.A = toLong(arraySum(`sum(github.actions.workflows)`))

21.title: Job Runs

23.title: Job Conclusions
23.query:
timeseries sum(github.actions.jobs), by: { github.actions.job.conclusion }, filter: { matchesValue(github.repository.name, $Repository) and matchesValue(github.actions.event.ref.name, $Branch) }
| fieldsAdd value.A = toLong(arraySum(`sum(github.actions.jobs)`))

24.title: Step Runs

26.title: Step Conclusions
26.query:
timeseries sum(github.actions.steps), by: { github.actions.step.conclusion }, filter: { matchesValue(github.repository.name, $Repository) and matchesValue(github.actions.event.ref.name, $Branch) }
| fieldsAdd value.A = toLong(arraySum(`sum(github.actions.steps)`))

27.title: Workflow Health
27.query:
fetch spans
| filter github.repository.name == $Repository and endsWith(github.actions.workflow.ref, $Branch)
| filter github.actions.type == "workflow" and not isNull(github.actions.workflow.name) and not isNull(github.actions.conclusion)
| filter github.actions.conclusion == "success" or github.actions.conclusion == "failure"
| summarize github.actions.conclusion.success=countIf(github.actions.conclusion == "success"), github.actions.conclusion.failure=countIf(github.actions.conclusion == "failure"), by: { github.actions.workflow.name }
| fieldsAdd github.actions.workflow.name, github.actions.conclusion.success.ratio = 100 * toDouble(github.actions.conclusion.success) / toDouble(github.actions.conclusion.success + github.actions.conclusion.failure)

28.title: Job Health
28.query:
fetch spans
| filter github.repository.name == $Repository and endsWith(github.actions.workflow.ref, $Branch)
| filter github.actions.type == "job" and not isNull(github.actions.job.name) and not isNull(github.actions.conclusion)
| filter github.actions.conclusion == "success" or github.actions.conclusion == "failure"
| summarize github.actions.conclusion.success=countIf(github.actions.conclusion == "success"), github.actions.conclusion.failure=countIf(github.actions.conclusion == "failure"), by: { github.actions.job.name }
| fieldsAdd github.actions.job.name, github.actions.conclusion.success.ratio = 100 * toDouble(github.actions.conclusion.success) / toDouble(github.actions.conclusion.success + github.actions.conclusion.failure)

29.title: Step Health
29.query:
fetch spans
| filter github.repository.name == $Repository and endsWith(github.actions.workflow.ref, $Branch)
| filter github.actions.type == "step" and not isNull(github.actions.step.name) and not isNull(github.actions.conclusion)
| filter github.actions.conclusion == "success" or github.actions.conclusion == "failure"
| summarize github.actions.conclusion.success=countIf(github.actions.conclusion == "success"), github.actions.conclusion.failure=countIf(github.actions.conclusion == "failure"), by: { github.actions.step.name }
| fieldsAdd github.actions.step.name, github.actions.conclusion.success.ratio = 100 * toDouble(github.actions.conclusion.success) / toDouble(github.actions.conclusion.success + github.actions.conclusion.failure)

30.title: Action Runs

31.title: Action Conclusions
31.query:
timeseries sum(github.actions.actions), by: { github.actions.action.conclusion }, filter: { matchesValue(github.repository.name, $Repository) and matchesValue(github.actions.event.ref.name, $Branch) }
| fieldsAdd value.A = toLong(arraySum(`sum(github.actions.actions)`))

32.title: Action Health
32.query:
fetch spans
| filter github.repository.name == $Repository and endsWith(github.actions.workflow.ref, $Branch)
| filter github.actions.type == "step" and not isNull(github.actions.action.name) and not isNull(github.actions.conclusion)
| filter github.actions.conclusion == "success" or github.actions.conclusion == "failure"
| summarize github.actions.conclusion.success=countIf(github.actions.conclusion == "success"), github.actions.conclusion.failure=countIf(github.actions.conclusion == "failure"), by: { github.actions.action.name }
| fieldsAdd github.actions.action.name, github.actions.conclusion.success.ratio = 100 * toDouble(github.actions.conclusion.success) / toDouble(github.actions.conclusion.success + github.actions.conclusion.failure)

33.title: Last Failed Traces
33.query:
fetch spans
| filter github.actions.type == "workflow"
| filter github.repository.name == $Repository and github.actions.event.ref.name == $Branch
| filter span.status_code == "error"
| sort start_time desc
| limit 10

34.title: Last Abnormal Logs
34.query:
fetch logs
| filter github.repository.name == $Repository and endsWith(github.actions.workflow.ref, $Branch)
| filter loglevel != "NONE" and loglevel != "INFO" and loglevel != "DEBUG" and loglevel != "TRACE"
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 10

36.title: API Rate Limit Used
36.query:
timeseries { max(github.api.rate_limit.used), min(github.api.rate_limit.remaining) }, filter: { matchesValue(github.repository.name, $Repository) }, by: { github.api.resource }
| fieldsAdd value.A = arrayAvg(`max(github.api.rate_limit.used)`)
| fieldsAdd value.B = arrayAvg(`min(github.api.rate_limit.remaining)`)
| fieldsAdd C = 100*`max(github.api.rate_limit.used)`[]/(`max(github.api.rate_limit.used)`[]+`min(github.api.rate_limit.remaining)`[])
| filter arraySum(C) > 0
| fieldsRemove `max(github.api.rate_limit.used)`
| fieldsRemove `min(github.api.rate_limit.remaining)`

40.title: HTTP Health
40.query:
fetch spans
| filter github.repository.name == $Repository AND endsWith(github.actions.workflow.ref, concat("/", $Branch))
| filter not isNull(http.request.method)
| fieldsAdd http.response.status_code.string = toString(http.response.status_code)
| summarize http.conclusion.success=countIf(startsWith(http.response.status_code.string, "1") or startsWith(http.response.status_code.string, "2") or startsWith(http.response.status_code.string, "3")), http.conclusion.failure=countIf(startsWith(http.response.status_code.string, "4") or startsWith(http.response.status_code.string, "5")), by: { server.address }
| fieldsAdd server.address, http.conclusion.success.ratio = 100 * toDouble(http.conclusion.success) / toDouble(http.conclusion.success + http.conclusion.failure)

43.title: HTTP Requests
43.query: timeseries { count(http.client.request.duration), value.A = count(http.client.request.duration, scalar: true) }, filter: { matchesValue(github.repository.name, $Repository) AND endsWith(github.actions.workflow.ref, concat("/", $Branch)) }

44.title: HTTP Responses
44.query: timeseries { count(http.client.request.duration), value.A = count(http.client.request.duration, scalar: true) }, by: { http.response.status_code }, filter: { matchesValue(github.repository.name, $Repository) and endsWith(github.actions.workflow.ref, concat("/", $Branch)) }
